title: Holding Hands
content: The amusement park was crowded with families and children. Olivia and Daniel spent the afternoon riding roller coasters, eating popcorn, and playing games. As they walked through the evening lights, Daniel quietly reached for Olivia's hand. She looked at him, smiled, and held it tightly. Neither of them said anything because they did not need to. The warm lights, the cheerful music, and the simple moment made them both feel happy. Sometimes, holding hands could say more than a thousand words.
